claims.name: Exp3v8 AvC total task-condition points
claims.statement: Total number of task-condition points (40 A-vs-C biography pairs × 50 comparison tasks) plotted in the Exp3v8 fine-grained biography-injection scatter for Gemma-3-27B.
claims.source: manual: producer requires activations/ood/exp3v8_minimal_pairs and results/probes/gemma3_10k_heldout_std_demean (both currently not synced locally; see paper/TODO_producers.md). Value from experiments/probe_generalization/ood_system_prompts/exp3_v8/exp3_v8_report.md.
claims.derivation: Manual value transcribed from exp3_v8_report.md; original producer is scripts/ood_system_prompts/plot_exp3v8_avc.py (count of points across all A-vs-C pairs), re-run once activations/ood/exp3v8_minimal_pairs and results/probes/gemma3_10k_heldout_std_demean are synced locally.

claims.name: Exp3v8 AvC target tasks total
claims.statement: Number of (base_role, target) A-vs-C biography pairs in the Exp3v8 fine-grained experiment on Gemma-3-27B — 20 targets × 2 base roles; the denominator for the probe-ranks-target-#1 rate.
claims.source: manual: producer requires activations/ood/exp3v8_minimal_pairs and results/probes/gemma3_10k_heldout_std_demean (both currently not synced locally). Value from docs/lw_post/section3_draft.md and qwen_replication_report.md.
claims.derivation: Manual value (20 targets × 2 base roles = 40) transcribed from exp3_v8_report.md; original producer is scripts/ood_system_prompts/plot_exp3v8_avc.py — re-run once activations/ood/exp3v8_minimal_pairs and results/probes/gemma3_10k_heldout_std_demean are synced locally.

claims.name: Exp3v8 AvC target tasks probe ranks 1
claims.statement: Number of A-vs-C biography pairs on which the Gemma-3-27B L31 ridge probe ranks the target task #1 out of 50 by probe delta (probe_A - probe_C). Rendered in §B.5 prose as “ranks the target task #1 of 50 in 36/40 pro-vs-anti comparisons”.
claims.source: manual: producer requires activations/ood/exp3v8_minimal_pairs and results/probes/gemma3_10k_heldout_std_demean (both currently not synced locally). Value from docs/lw_post/section3_draft.md and experiments/qwen_replication/qwen_replication_report.md.
claims.derivation: Manual value (36/40) transcribed from exp3_v8_report.md; original producer is scripts/ood_system_prompts/plot_exp3v8_avc.py — re-run once activations/ood/exp3v8_minimal_pairs and results/probes/gemma3_10k_heldout_std_demean are synced locally.

claims.name: Exp3v8 AvC probe delta pooled r all points
claims.statement: Pearson r between per-task probe delta (probe_A - probe_C) and behavioural delta (P_A - P_C) pooled across all 2,000 task-condition points in the Exp3v8 fine-grained biography-injection scatter on Gemma-3-27B (ridge probe, L31). Rendered in the figure legend as ‘All (r = 0.62)’.
claims.source: manual: producer requires activations/ood/exp3v8_minimal_pairs and results/probes/gemma3_10k_heldout_std_demean (both currently not synced locally). Value from experiments/probe_generalization/ood_system_prompts/exp3_v8/exp3_v8_report.md.
claims.derivation: Manual value (r=0.62) transcribed from exp3_v8_report.md; original producer is scripts/ood_system_prompts/plot_exp3v8_avc.py — re-run once activations/ood/exp3v8_minimal_pairs and results/probes/gemma3_10k_heldout_std_demean are synced locally.
